hero.subtitle: CatWiki Knowledge Plaza
hero.description: Where wisdom converges. Connect scattered nodes, discover deep insights, empower every site with AI, and make search and chat within reach.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Search and explore sites or content...

empty.title: No matching sites found
empty.description: Try different keywords or create your own knowledge space here.

SlugPage.siteNotPublic: This site is not public. Please contact the administrator for access.

notFound.title: Tenant Not Found
notFound.description: Sorry, tenant "{tenantSlug}" does not exist or has no public sites.

Sidebar.aiPrompt: Try asking a question directly in the search bar for AI retrieval.

AIChat.description: Semantic search & Q&A based on RAG
AIChat.inputPlaceholder: Ask a question about the knowledge base...
AIChat.disclaimer: AI may produce errors, please refer to the original document.

AIChatLanding.description: You can ask me any questions about the knowledge base or let me search for information in documents.

ChatHistory.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this session?
ChatHistory.clearAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all history? This cannot be undone.

ChatWidget.defaultWelcome: Hello! I'm the AI assistant, how can I help you?

SiteNotFound.title: Site Not Found

Metadata.title: CatWiki - Enterprise AI Knowledge Base
Metadata.description: CatWiki - Enterprise full-stack AI knowledge base platform with modern content management, deep AI Q&A, and exceptional user experience.

GlobalError.title: Something went wrong
GlobalError.fallback: An unexpected error occurred. Please refresh the page and try again.

DocumentDetail.emptyDescription: Select an article from the left directory or menu to start reading, or use AI to search for content you are interested in.
DocumentDetail.feedbackDesc: Your feedback will help us optimize AI search results.
